spec.objective: Add CodexProviderSecretRef field to ProjectSpec (schema-additive, backwards-compatible) and wire it into internal/dispatch/podjob/jobspec.go as a second envFrom secretRef on dispatch Job pods, mirroring the existing ProviderSecretRef mount. Regenerate CRD manifest and deepcopy. Add jobspec_test.go assertion that CodexProviderSecretRef mounts as envFrom when set and is absent when unset. make manifests and make generate exit 0 with no uncommitted diff; make test exits 0.
